diseases.name: Yellow Rust (Stripe Rust)
diseases.symptoms: Yellow-orange stripes along leaf veins, powdery spores
diseases.chemical_treatment: Spray Propiconazole 25% EC at 0.1% concentration. Apply 2-3 times at 10-day intervals.
diseases.organic_treatment: Apply sulfur dust 20 kg/acre. Improve field ventilation by thinning plant density.

diseases.name: Brown Rust (Leaf Rust)
diseases.symptoms: Small orange-brown pustules on upper leaf surface
diseases.chemical_treatment: Spray Tebuconazole 25.9% EW at 200ml/acre. Repeat after 14 days if needed.
diseases.organic_treatment: Remove infected plant debris. Apply neem oil spray (5ml/L water).

diseases.name: Cotton Leaf Curl Virus (CLCuV)
diseases.symptoms: Upward curling leaves, dark veins, small leaf-like outgrowths (enations)
diseases.chemical_treatment: Control whitefly vector: Imidacloprid 200 SL at 200ml/acre. No cure for virus — remove infected plants.
diseases.organic_treatment: Install yellow sticky traps. Apply neem-based pesticide. Plant resistant varieties like MNH-886.

diseases.name: Boll Rot
diseases.symptoms: Soft, water-soaked bolls that turn brown and rot
diseases.chemical_treatment: Spray Mancozeb 80% WP at 2 g/L. Apply copper oxychloride 50% WP at 3g/L.
diseases.organic_treatment: Improve drainage. Avoid overhead irrigation. Remove and destroy infected bolls.

diseases.name: Rice Blast
diseases.symptoms: Diamond-shaped gray lesions with brown borders on leaves and neck
diseases.chemical_treatment: Spray Tricyclazole 75% WP at 300g/acre or Azoxystrobin 23% SC at 200ml/acre.
diseases.organic_treatment: Apply silicon-rich amendments. Avoid excess nitrogen. Use resistant varieties like Basmati-515.

diseases.name: Sheath Blight
diseases.symptoms: Oval lesions on leaf sheaths with gray centers and brown margins
diseases.chemical_treatment: Spray Hexaconazole 5% EC at 400ml/acre. Apply at tillering stage.
diseases.organic_treatment: Reduce plant density. Apply Trichoderma viride 2.5 kg/acre mixed in FYM.

diseases.name: Late Blight
diseases.symptoms: Water-soaked dark patches on leaves, white mold under leaves
diseases.chemical_treatment: Spray Mancozeb 2g/L + Metalaxyl 0.5g/L. Repeat every 7 days in humid weather.
diseases.organic_treatment: Apply copper-based fungicide. Remove infected plant parts. Improve air circulation.

diseases.name: Stem Borer
diseases.symptoms: Small holes in stem, dead central shoot (dead heart), frass visible
diseases.chemical_treatment: Apply Chlorpyriphos 20 EC at 1.5L/acre. Use Fipronil 5% SC for severe infestation.
diseases.organic_treatment: Release Trichogramma parasitoid cards 50,000/acre. Apply neem seed kernel extract 5%.

diseases.name: Red Rot
diseases.symptoms: Red discoloration inside the stalk with white patches, foul smell
diseases.chemical_treatment: No effective chemical cure. Destroy infected stools. Treat seed material with Carbendazim 50% WP (1g/L).
diseases.organic_treatment: Use disease-free seed material. Plant resistant varieties like CPF-246. Avoid waterlogging.

diseases.name: Early Blight
diseases.symptoms: Dark brown concentric ring spots on older leaves (target board pattern)
diseases.chemical_treatment: Spray Mancozeb 80% WP at 2.5g/L every 7-10 days. Chlorothalonil 75% WP is also effective.
diseases.organic_treatment: Crop rotation with non-solanaceous crops. Apply compost to improve soil health.

diseases.name: Aphid Infestation
diseases.symptoms: Small green/black insects on leaves, sticky honeydew, yellowing leaves
diseases.chemical_treatment: Spray Imidacloprid 200 SL at 80ml/acre or Dimethoate 40 EC at 500ml/acre.
diseases.organic_treatment: Spray soapy water (5g soap/L). Introduce ladybird beetles. Apply neem oil 5ml/L.

diseases.name: Powdery Mildew
diseases.symptoms: White powdery coating on leaves, shoots, and fruits
diseases.chemical_treatment: Spray Sulfur 80% WP at 2g/L or Hexaconazole 5% SC at 1ml/L.
diseases.organic_treatment: Spray diluted milk (1:10 ratio). Baking soda solution (5g/L). Improve air circulation.

diseases.name: Mango Malformation
diseases.symptoms: Abnormal bunchy vegetative/floral shoots, reduced fruit set
diseases.chemical_treatment: Spray NAA (Naphthalene Acetic Acid) at 200ppm before flowering. Remove infected tissue.
diseases.organic_treatment: Prune and burn malformed shoots. Apply Trichoderma to soil.

diseases.name: Locust Attack
diseases.symptoms: Large swarms of insects stripping plants completely in hours
diseases.chemical_treatment: Emergency: Spray Malathion 96% ULV at 600ml/ha by air or ground rig. Contact NDMA immediately.
diseases.organic_treatment: Deploy noise-makers and reflective materials. Biopesticide: Metarhizium anisopliae fungal spray.
